calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FARINA FOCACCIA CUCINA ITALIANA, LLC DBA FARINA FOCCACIA & CUCINA ITALIANA AND DBA FARINA PIZZA & CUCINA ITALIANA'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is granted pursuant to CCP sec. 473(b). Defendant shall file and serve its proposed answer within ten days of entry of this Order. Policy favors a trial on the merits. (Rosenthal v. Garner (1983) 142 Cal.App.3d 891, 898.) The Declaration of Luca Minna establishes inadvertence or excusable neglect. The complaint was served on one of Defendant's employees who mislaid the complaint with other papers, rather than forward it to Defendant's agent for service of process. The motion was timely filed within six months of entry of default and default judgment because October 4, 2014 (six months from the date of entry of default) was on a Saturday. This motion was filed on October 6, 2014, the following Monday. The motion was filed within a reasonable period of time after Defendant dismissed its appeal. Although a satisfaction of judgment has been filed, this does not preclude Defendant from setting aside the default and default judgment. (See Patterson v. Keeney (1913) 165 Cal. 465, 466.) Plaintiff cites no authority to support its argument that Defendant cannot move to set aside the default because it appealed the entry of default. Even if this did constitute a general appearance, it occurred after default was entered. Lastly, evidence submitted in reply establishes that Defendant is authorized to conduct business in California. (See Declaration of Erica McDowell, par. 6.) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Continued To Jan-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT FARINA FOCACCIA CUCINA ITALIANA, LLC DBA FOCACCIA & CUCINA ITALIANA AND DBA FARINA PIZZA & CUCINA ITALIANA'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is continued to January 2, 2015 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 2, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Court'S Motion To Dismiss Appeal
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: no appearance by appellant.
